name: Conqueror Umbra
dialogue: Every trainer you beat to reach me is a name I know.
Past the boat lies the Lost Ruins — and I am the second seal.
preBattleLine: Umbra doesn't speak — she simply moves.
postDefeatDialogue: My name was the last on the list. Yours is the only one left.
The seal breaks. The boatman will take you across — the Lost Ruins answer to you now.
